items.claim: Beneil Dariush's chin has become unreliable and he is easily dropped by clean shots.
items.quote: A lot of guys you just touch Dariush's chin right now, and he goes down.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is hittable on the feet.
items.quote: Benoit, he's super tough, obviously, super durable guy. Go and watch the Elizeu Zaleski dos Santos fight, obviously, but he is hittable.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is a very strong fighter once he has completed his weight cut to 155 pounds.
items.quote: Paddy's very strong guy for 155 lb, and you know, he bulks and he balloons up to like 190, 195, 200 when he's not fighting, but the dude is very strong once he's cut that weight.

items.claim: Max Holloway's chin has declined and is no longer as durable as it was earlier in his career.
items.quote: I don't think the chin is where it used to be. I don't think it's where it used to be at all.

items.claim: Max Holloway leads the UFC in all-time cage time with over 8 hours and 52 minutes.
items.quote: Max Holloway leads the UFC in all-time cage time. The official number for Max Holloway is 8 hours and 52 minutes for Max Holloway.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not fought in five years.
items.quote: the fact he hasn't fought in 5 years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will be significantly stronger than Max Holloway due to the weight difference.
items.quote: the guy is going to be really strong and he's going to be significantly stronger than a 145-pounder Max Holloway who has not gotten an appropriate amount of time to build the weight back up.
